title: Multicenter iEEG dataset for classification of graphoelements and artifactual signals (MAYO)
description: A multicenter intracranial EEG dataset from Mayo Clinic containing approximately 2 hours of interictal recordings from epilepsy patients with implanted depth and grid/strip electrodes. The dataset includes annotations for seizure onset zone classification and artifactual signal detection, with standardized BIDS formatting and enriched metadata including electrode localization information and anatomical labels.
methods_description: Intracranial EEG recordings acquired using Neuralynx Cheetah system at 32 kHz and downsampled to 5 kHz with 60 Hz power line frequency. Recordings were obtained during the first night post-implant (01:00-03:00) from patients with depth and grid/strip electrodes (AD-Tech/PMT, Platinum/Iridium; 2.3 mm contact length, 1 mm diameter, 5/10 mm spacing). Ground electrode placed at scalp Fcz.
